nasb.text: Micaiah said, “Therefore, hear the word of the Lord. I saw the Lord sitting on His throne, and all the host of heaven standing on His right and on His left.

esv.text: And Micaiah said, “Therefore hear the word of the Lord: I saw the Lord sitting on his throne, and all the host of heaven standing on his right hand and on his left.

cnv.text: 米該雅說：“所以你們要聽耶和華的話。我看見耶和華坐在寶座上，天上的萬軍侍立在他左右。

ccb.text: 米该雅说：“你们要听耶和华的话。我看见耶和华坐在宝座上，众天军侍立在祂左右。
